steps: Go to https://dashboard.imgix.com and log in to your imgix account
Click the dropdown menu in the top-right corner (your account name)
Enter a descriptive name for the key
Select the required permissions (e.g., 'Full Access' or specific scopes like 'Sources' and 'Asset Manager')
Click 'Generate' and copy the API key immediately

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your imgix Management API key, used as a Bearer token in the Authorization header

notes: This key is for the imgix Management API (sources, assets, purges) — not for image rendering
Image rendering is done via URL parameters on your imgix subdomain (e.g., yoursubdomain.imgix.net/image.jpg?w=300)
Legacy API keys have been removed from the Account page; all new keys must be created from the API Keys page
Permissions can be scoped: set 'Asset Manager Browse' at minimum for asset listing
API keys are shown only once — save immediately after generation
imgix requires a paid account; a free trial is available

test_endpoint.description: List all imgix sources in your account to verify the API key
